top.title: Dozens killed as Israeli special forces raid Lebanese village in search of 40-year-old remains
top.summary: Overnight, one Israeli operation saw at least 41 people killed and 40 injured, according to the Lebanese health ministry.

top.title: US embassy in Oslo hit by explosion, Norway police say
top.summary: No injuries are reported after the blast in the Norwegian capital in the early hours on Sunday.

top.title: Boy, 12, among six dead as tornadoes hit Michigan and Oklahoma
top.summary: The storms uprooted trees, downed power lines, damaged buildings and ripped the roofs off some houses.

top.title: TfL hack in 2024 affected around 10 million people, BBC can reveal
top.summary: TfL insists it has "kept customers informed throughout this incident and will continue to take all necessary action".

top.title: Anthropic vows to sue Pentagon over supply chain risk label
top.summary: The supply chain risk designation of the artificial intelligence firm is a first for a US company.

top.title: Xbox confirms new console is coming - but can it revive the brand?
top.summary: Microsoft is the first big company out of the gates with Project Helix - a "next-generation" console.

title.#text: Sony appears to be testing dynamic pricing on PlayStation games
Time’s running out to get a free gift card when you preorder a new MacBook
